name: Urjanet Utility Data API
what_it_does: Utility data aggregation platform with REST API — enabling enterprises, sustainability platforms, and fintech companies to access structured electricity, natural gas, water, and solar energy data from 10,000+ utilities worldwide via automated bill data extraction, meter reads, and normalized usage data for ESG reporting, energy management, and financial underwriting.
use_cases: Retrieving normalized utility billing data via Urjanet API for ESG and sustainability reporting
Accessing historical energy usage data via Urjanet API for energy management analytics
Automating utility bill collection via Urjanet API for commercial real estate expense tracking
Building energy benchmarking tools via Urjanet API for portfolio energy performance analysis
Integrating utility data into fintech underwriting via Urjanet API for creditworthiness assessment
not_for: Real-time energy monitoring (Urjanet is bill-based data, not real-time meter streaming)
Residential consumer applications without enterprise agreement
Companies outside Urjanet's 10,000+ utility coverage area
best_when: A sustainability platform, ESCO (Energy Service Company), commercial real estate firm, or fintech company needs automated access to utility bill data across thousands of utilities — for ESG reporting, benchmarking, or underwriting.
avoid_when: You need real-time meter data, consumer residential focus, or utilities outside Urjanet's coverage.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow. Bearer token auth. Scoped access per data type (electricity, gas, water). Webhook for utility data availability notifications. REST API for data retrieval and account management. Token expiry with refresh. Enterprise API access via contract. No self-service API key — requires enterprise agreement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.notes: Atlanta company. Founded 2012 by Sanjoy Malik. Acquired by Arcadia (2022) — now part of Arcadia sustainability platform. 10,000+ utilities covered globally. Data types: electricity, natural gas, water, solar. Automated utility bill retrieval (OCR + structured data). ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager integration. Used by: ESCOs, commercial real estate, sustainability software, fintech. Green building certification support (LEED, ENERGY STAR). Normalized data across utility formats. Historical data going back years. Privacy considerations for utility data.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OAuth2. Webhook for data availability. SOC2 compliant. Enterprise-only — no self-service. Acquired by Arcadia (2022) — API roadmap may change. Utility data is bill-based (monthly/bi-monthly) — not real-time. Annual contract required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Bill data reads fully idempotent by account and date. Meter reads idempotent by period. Account reads idempotent. Data availability webhooks may deliver duplicate notifications.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise contract required — cannot self-serve sign up for API access
Acquired by Arcadia (2022) — integration and API changes possible
Utility data is monthly/bi-monthly — not real-time streaming
Utility coverage varies by region — verify coverage before building on platform
Privacy considerations: utility data includes location and consumption patterns (PII)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 compliant. OAuth2 client credentials with scoped access. Utility data contains PII (address, consumption) — CCPA/GDPR awareness required. Enterprise contract includes DPA. US data residency. Arcadia acquisition — evaluate new security posture. Domain verification for enterprise API access.
